momentum.description: Developer adoption and retail interest signals

sec_gross_margin.label: Gross Margin
sec_gross_margin.description: Gross profit margin as a decimal (e.g. 0.784 = 78.4%)

macro_rate.label: Fed Funds Rate
macro_rate.description: Federal funds effective rate in percent

news_sentiment.label: News Sentiment Score
news_sentiment.description: Aggregate news sentiment from -1 (very negative) to +1 (very positive)

github_growth.description: Number of new trending repositories in the last 90 days

google_trends.label: Google Search Interest
google_trends.description: Relative search interest index from Google Trends (100 = peak)
